name: Passionlip
description:
The MASSIVE, strong & lovable clutz Alter-Ego M of Love & Hate.
⊰ ⛧ ⊱

Back when I made her she was the only Passionlip on the site. Later I redefined the scenario and put more Fate lore in it as well so now this bot is you and Lip during a Grail War.

The bot has her 3rd Ascension appearance because this was one of my favorite giant boobs Passionlip art. I did use the Ascension stuff for the initial message, but since it's kinda irrelevant as you're not in Chaldea, you're free to ignore it.

Sauce of the image is the 12th picture on this pixiv post: https://www.pixiv.net/en/artworks/93365029

Oh yeah, pointless inclusion of saying Hyper Tits in the description so the bot shows up when you look for those.
creator: Maxience
